name: google-earth
description: Google Earth satellite imagery restoration — CONFIRMED WORKING. Deploys pre-patched libembeddedearth.so (11 patches: 2 code + 9 hostname), custom dbRoot, cached auth. Tiles from kh.google.com (still live!). Requires LTE internet + proxy on PC.
author: dspl1236
scripts: ge_probe.sh - SAFE: Probe GEMMI state, check binary patches, verify connectivity
ge_activate.sh - Deploy: patch binary, deploy dbRoot/auth/server, set hosts
ge_restore.sh - SAFE: Revert all changes, restore original binary
recommended_flow: 1. Run ge_probe.sh — verify GEMMI exists and check current state
2. Ensure LTE internet (USB ethernet + Digi WR11 or similar)
3. Run ge_activate.sh — patches binary, deploys all files
5. Open Google Earth from map menu — satellite imagery!
6. If issues: run ge_restore.sh to revert

technical.tiles: Direct from kh.google.com via car's LTE connection
technical.proxy: On-car mini HTTP server (gemmi_server.sh) for dbRoot/auth
